title: Gunnery Sergeant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Gunnery}}
[[File:Stew-DT.png|thumb|right|180px|Stew, a Gunnery Sergeant]]
'''Gunnery Sergeant''' was an enlisted [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] in the [[Navy/Legends|navies]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="Bounty Hunter: Boba Fett">''[[The Clone Wars: Bounty Hunter: Boba Fett]]''</ref> [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="Shadow Stalker">{{GalaxyCite|10|Shadow Stalker}}</ref> and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="Planet of Twilight">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>

This rank was in use in the [[Imperial Army (Sith Empire)|Imperial Army]] of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]] during the [[Sith Wars/Legends|Sith Wars]].<ref name="IGS">{{TORcite|type=enemy|Imperial Gunnery Sergeant|[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]}}</ref>

[[Clone gunner/Legends|Clone tank gunner]] [[Stew (clone gunner)/Legends|Stew]] was a Gunnery Sergeant aboard the [[Endurance/Legends|''Endurance'']].<ref name="Bounty Hunter: Boba Fett" />

{{Military-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Gunnery Sergeant|Gunnery Sergeant]] is the seventh enlisted rank in the United States Marine Corps.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Clone Wars: Bounty Hunter: Boba Fett]]''
*{{GalaxyCite|10|Shadow Stalker}}
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''
